audit_items.proof_trace: get_string_list_header calls string_hash(key) which dereferences key without NULL check. When key is NULL, string_hash performs NULL pointer dereference at line 1039 (*str++). Callers ur_string_map_put/get/del do not validate key before passing.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker can trigger crash via TURN authentication with empty username field, causing NULL pointer dereference in string_hash leading to denial of service.
